name: Novo SMB Business Banking API
what_it_does: Novo SMB business banking REST API for small businesses, freelancers, and startups to manage business checking accounts, payments, and financial operations through a mobile-first digital bank built on Middlesex Federal Savings. Enables AI agents to manage business checking account operations for small business financial management automation, handle ACH transfers and bill payments for business payment automation, access debit card transaction monitoring for business spend tracking automation, retrieve real-time account balance and transaction history for cash flow automation, manage invoice creation and payment collection through Novo Invoicing for accounts receivable automation, handle Express ACH for same-day payment processing automation, access Novo Boost (early Stripe payouts) for cash flow management automation, retrieve accounting software sync (QuickBooks, Xero, Wave) for bookkeeping automation, manage integrations with ecommerce platforms (Shopify, Etsy, Amazon) for SMB revenue tracking automation, and integrate Novo with business tools for connected SMB financial operations.
use_cases: Managing business checking from SMB financial operations agents
Processing ACH payments from small business payment agents
Syncing transactions from bookkeeping automation agents
Tracking cash flow from freelancer financial management agents
not_for: Enterprise banking with complex treasury needs (use JPMorgan or Wells Fargo)
International wire transfers (Novo has limited international capabilities)
best_when: A small business, freelancer, or startup wanting AI agents to automate business checking account management, ACH payments, invoice collection, and accounting software synchronization through Novo's SMB digital banking platform.
avoid_when: FDIC INSURANCE PASS-THROUGH DEPENDENCY ON MIDDLESEX FEDERAL: Novo accounts are held at Middlesex Federal Savings (FDIC member); FDIC insurance is pass-through from Novo to Middlesex Federal; automated cash management strategies that treat Novo as a primary enterprise bank without understanding pass-through insurance structure may misunderstand deposit protection limits. INTERNATIONAL PAYMENT LIMITATIONS FOR GLOBAL SMB: Novo has limited international wire capabilities compared to full-service banks; automated payment workflows for SMBs with international supplier payments may hit Novo capability constraints; design international payment automation with wire capability verification before relying on Novo for cross-border supplier payment automation. API MATURITY FOR COMPLEX AUTOMATION: Novo's developer API is less mature than enterprise banking APIs; automated integration complexity should match Novo's API capability level; advanced treasury automation workflows designed for enterprise banking APIs may require significant simplification for Novo's SMB-focused API surface.

auth.notes: Novo uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2016 by Michael Rangel and Tyler McIntyre. Backed by Valar Ventures, Crosslink Capital, Anthemis ($135M+ raised). Banking partner: Middlesex Federal Savings (FDIC member). 200,000+ SMB customers. Products: Business checking, debit card, invoicing, Novo Boost (early Stripe payouts), Express ACH. Integration: Shopify, Etsy, Amazon, Stripe, Square, QuickBooks, Xero, Wave. SMB-focused neobank. Competes with Mercury, Relay Financial, and Found for SMB neobanking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free business checking with no monthly fees; fee-free ACH; some premium features require paid plan
pricing.paid_tiers: Free core banking; Express ACH fee per transaction; optional premium features
pricing.notes: New York NY. Valar Ventures, Crosslink backed. Free business checking. Fee-free ACH. SMB-focused.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; account and transaction queries throttled; webhooks for transaction and payment events

known_agent_gotchas: NOVO BOOST STRIPE PAYOUTS DEPENDENCY: Novo Boost (early Stripe payout) requires active Stripe account connected to Novo; automated cash flow management using Novo Boost assumes Stripe processing relationship; automated Novo Boost triggering without active Stripe connection creates feature unavailability; verify Stripe connection status before automated cash acceleration workflows

INVOICE PAYMENT COLLECTION TIMING UNCERTAINTY: Novo Invoicing sends invoices to customers but payment timing is customer-controlled (ACH bank transfer); automated cash flow forecasting based on Novo invoice due dates must account for customer payment timing variance; automated revenue recognition on invoice due date without payment confirmation creates premature revenue booking

ACH RETURN HANDLING FOR AUTOMATED PAYMENT: Novo ACH payments can return for insufficient funds, invalid account, or unauthorized; automated payment retry without return code analysis creates repeated failed payments; implement return code analysis (R01 NSF vs R02 invalid account) before automated retry to avoid payment spam for invalid accounts

BUSINESS ACCOUNT VERIFICATION FOR HIGH-VOLUME ACH: Novo may require additional business verification for high-volume ACH origination; automated payment workflows that ramp ACH volume quickly may trigger enhanced verification holds; plan for ACH volume ramp with Novo support coordination before automated high-volume payment deployment

TRANSACTION CATEGORIZATION ACCURACY FOR BOOKKEEPING SYNC: Novo's automatic transaction categorization for accounting sync uses rule-based categorization; automated bookkeeping sync may miscategorize unusual transaction types; implement category review workflow for automated bookkeeping sync to catch miscategorization before accounting software posting
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB neobank. FDIC pass-through, FinCEN, BSA. OAuth2. US. Business account and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SMB banking. FDIC pass-through, FinCEN, BSA. OAuth2. US. Business account and transaction data.
